main.description: Download a whole permissioned repo as a serialized CAR file for full-state backfill. The CAR header declares two roots, in order: the signed commit block, then a DAG-CBOR index map from '{collection}/{rkey}' to record CID with keys in lexicographic order. Record blocks follow in the same order. Blobs are not included. Requires a covering OAuth scope or a space credential; implemented by a repo host.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

did.description: The DID of the repo's author.
